betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Americium-241§f

§aRare radioisotope from plutonium decay — powers late-game RTG pellets and RBMK fuel!§f

§bAmericium-241§f is a rare radioisotope produced only by the decay of §bPu-241§f in RBMK reactors. It's useful for late-game power generation and as a nuclear fuel.

§6Properties§f:
§b• Radioactivity§f: §e8.5§f RAD/s
§b• Category§f: Radiation emitter
§b• Difficulty§f: Hard

§6Production§f (SILEX):
§b• Short-Lived Nuclear Waste§f + BiSmUTh crystal → 25% Am-241, 35% Am-242, etc.
§b• Reactor Grade Americium§f → 33% Am-241, 66% Am-242

§6Uses§f:
§b• RBMK Fuel§f: Low, Medium, and Highly Enriched Americium fuel rods. HEA-241 uses fast neutrons — no moderation needed!
§b• RTG Pellet§f: §e20§f thermal power for §e3.384B§f ticks (~5.5 years real, 705 in-game). §e67.68B§f HE total. Decays to Neptunium.
§b• Self-Charging Battery§f: Am-241 billet → §e20§f HE/tick
§b• Reactor Grade Americium§f: combine with Am-242

§eTip§f: Americium-241 RTG pellets are the most powerful passive power source. Each pellet lasts over 5 real years! Set up Pu-241 RBMK fuel to start americium production.
